twitter_thread: 80% of AI side hustles fail due to poor tool choice, with $10k+ in wasted cloud costs.
Python and the transformers library can handle 90% of NLP tasks.
Hugging Face's model hub has 10k+ pre-trained models, including BERT and RoBERTa.
Training models locally can save $500/month in cloud fees.
Outsourcing data labeling tasks to platforms like Clickworker can cost as little as $5/hour.
Batching similar tasks can reduce compute costs by 30%.
What's the most effective way you've used AI in a side hustle? #aisidehustle #machinelearning
pack.linkedin: 80% of AI side hustles fail due to poor tool choice, resulting in $10k+ in wasted cloud costs. To avoid this, start with Python and the transformers library, which can handle 90% of NLP tasks. Utilize Hugging Face's model hub, featuring 10k+ pre-trained models. Train models locally to save $500/month in cloud fees. Consider outsourcing data labeling tasks to platforms like Clickworker for as little as $5/hour. By batching similar tasks, you can reduce compute costs by 30%. What strategies have you found most effective in using AI for a side hustle?
tiktok_hooks: Save $10k by choosing the right AI tools
Train AI models on your laptop, not the cloud
Get 10k pre-trained AI models for free with Hugging Face
pack.reddit_headline: Relying on cloud services for AI side hustles: a $10k mistake?
